title: bidens gentryi
intro: Bidens gentryi, also known as Gentry's beggar-ticks, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Bidens gentryi include its ability to reduce swelling, treat wounds, and alleviate fever. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and salves, to harness its medicinal properties.
